messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a Python script using python-pptx to build an 20-slide futuristic tech presentation for C-Suite executives in the telecommunications industry analyzing network upgrades. The output file must be named "telecom_network.pptx" and all content should be in Japanese. Use the standard 16:9 Widescreen slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping to fetch data; use hardcoded sample data only. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, implement defensive programming by ensuring that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip('#')
    return RGBColor(int(hex_color[0:2], 16), int(hex_color[2:4], 16), int(hex_color[4:6], 16))


WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

BG_DARK = hex_to_rgb('#0A1628')
BG_MID = hex_to_rgb('#121E33')
ACCENT_BLUE = hex_to_rgb('#00D4FF')
ACCENT_CYAN = hex_to_rgb('#00E5FF')
WHITE = hex_to_rgb('#FFFFFF')
LIGHT_GRAY = hex_to_rgb('#B0C4DE')
GOLD = hex_to_rgb('#FFD700')
RED_ACCENT = hex_to_rgb('#FF6B6B')
GREEN_ACCENT = hex_to_rgb('#4ECDC4')

FONT_PRIMARY = 'Aptos'
FONT_SECONDARY = 'Calibri'
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(2.8)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(1.5)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.3)


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    bg_color = hex_to_rgb(color_hex) if isinstance(color_hex, str) else color_hex
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color


def add_text_box(slide, x, y, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    if color_hex is None:
        color_hex = WHITE
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex) if isinstance(color_hex, str) else color_hex
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, x, y, width, height, title, body=None, bg_color='#121E33', border_color='#00D4FF'):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     title, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex='#00D4FF')
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.6), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.75),
                     body, font_size=11, color_hex='#B0C4DE')
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, x, y, label_text):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.35), Inches(0.6), Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_BLUE
    line.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, x, y, Inches(4), Inches(0.3), label_text, font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex='#00D4FF')


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=20):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(7.1), Inches(2), Inches(0.3),
                 f'{page_num} / {total_pages}', font_size=9, color_hex='#B0C4DE', alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb('#121E33')
        shape.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_BLUE
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.4), width - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.3),
                     '画像プレースホルダー', font_size=11, color_hex='#B0C4DE', alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_decorative_line(slide, x1, y1, x2, y2, color_hex='#00D4FF'):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x1, y1, x2 - x1, Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_circle_shape(slide, cx, cy, radius, fill_color='#0A1628', border_color='#00D4FF'):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, cx - Inches(radius), cy - Inches(radius),
                                   Inches(radius * 2), Inches(radius * 2))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(fill_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)


def build_slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1), Inches(1.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.5),
                 'ネットワークアップグレード戦略', font_size=40, bold=True, color_hex='#FFFFFF')
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1), Inches(2.3), Inches(4), Inches(2.3))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1), Inches(2.6), Inches(11), Inches(1.5),
                 '次世代通信インフラの構築とデジタルトランスフォーメーション\nC-Suite 向け戦略レポート', font_size=20, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1), Inches(5.5), Inches(6), Inches(0.3),
                 '日付: 2025年7月 | 対象: エグゼクティブ層', font_size=12, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_circle_shape(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(6.8), 0.3)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9), Inches(6.5), Inches(4), Inches(0.5),
                 '通信テクノロジー株式会社', font_size=12, color_hex='#00D4FF')

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def build_slide_02_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'アジェンダ'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(2), Inches(1.35))

    items = [
        ('01', 'エグゼクティブサマリー'),
        ('02', '現状分析と市場動向'),
        ('03', '技術ロードマップ'),
        ('04', '投資対効果（ROI）分析'),
        ('05', 'リスク評価と対策'),
        ('06', '競争優位性とKPI'),
    ]

    for i, (num, text) in enumerate(items):
        y = Inches(1.8) + Inches(i * 0.9)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1), y, Inches(1), Inches(0.5), num, font_size=24, bold=True, color_hex='#00D4FF')
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), text, font_size=16, color_hex='#FFFFFF')

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def build_slide_03_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'エグゼクティブサマリー'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    metrics = [
        ('¥2,850億', '総投資額'),
        ('37%', 'ネットワーク効率向上'),
        ('18ヶ月', '完了予定期間'),
        ('¥920億', '年間コスト削減'),
    ]

    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(2.8), Inches(2.5), value, label, '#121E33', '#00D4FF')

    summary_text = '通信インフラの抜本的なアップグレードにより、5G/6G対応ネットワーク基盤を構築。AI駆動の最適化とエッジコンピューティング統合で、サービス品質と収益性を同時に向上させます。'
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.8), Inches(12), Inches(1.5), summary_text, font_size=13, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def build_slide_04_current_state(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = '現状分析'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(2), Inches(1.35))

    points = [
        ('ネットワーク容量', '現在のトラフィックはピーク時に92%に達し、ボトルネックが発生'),
        ('レイテンシ', '平均応答時間45ms。低遅延サービスには改善が必要'),
        ('スケーラビリティ', '既存アーキテクチャでは新サービスの展開が制限されている'),
        ('セキュリティ', 'ゼロトラストモデルへの移行が急務'),
    ]

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(points):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(2.8), Inches(4.5), title, desc, '#121E33', '#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def build_slide_05_market_trends(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = '市場動向と成長予測'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['2023', '2024', '2025', '2026', '2027', '2028']
    chart_data.add_series('通信インフラ投資（兆円）', (1.2, 1.5, 2.1, 2.8, 3.4, 4.2))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(7), Inches(4.5), chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_BLUE
    series.format.line.width = Pt(3)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.2), Inches(1.7), Inches(4.5), Inches(4.5),
                 '通信インフラ市場は年率18%で成長。5G展開とエッジコンピューティング需要が牽引。', font_size=13, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def build_slide_06_technology_landscape(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = '技術ランドスケープ'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    techs = [
        ('5G/6G', '次世代無線アクセス'),
        ('エッジAI', '分散型推論基盤'),
        ('SDN/NFV', 'ソフトウェア定義ネットワーク'),
        ('量子暗号', '将来のセキュリティ基盤'),
    ]

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(techs):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(2.8), Inches(2.5), title, desc, '#121E33', '#00D4FF')

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.7), Inches(12), Inches(2),
                 '統合技術戦略により、相互運用性と将来の拡張性を確保。各技術は独立して導入可能で、段階的な移行を実現します。', font_size=13, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def build_slide_07_fiber_optic(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = '光ファイバーインフラの深化'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    metrics = [
        ('85%', '都市部カバレッジ'),
        ('42%', '地方部カバレッジ'),
        ('12,000km', '新規敷設予定'),
        ('¥680億', '投資額'),
    ]

    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.7), Inches(2.8), Inches(2.5), value, label, '#121E33', '#FFD700')

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.6), Inches(12), Inches(2),
                 '都市部では95%、地方部では60%のカバレッジを2028年までに達成。DWDM技術により伝送容量を10倍に拡大します。', font_size=13, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def build_slide_08_edge_computing(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'エッジコンピューティング統合'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, './assets/edge_architecture.png', Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(8), Inches(4))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9), Inches(1.7), Inches(3.5), Inches(4),
                 'エッジノード: 2,400箇所\nレイテンシ削減: 60%\n帯域節約: 45%\n処理能力: 150 TFLOPS', font_size=12, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def build_slide_09_ai_optimization(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'AI駆動ネットワーク最適化'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['従来', 'AI導入後']
    chart_data.add_series('処理速度（ms）', (45, 12))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5), chart_data)
    plot = chart_frame.chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.fill.solid()
        series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_BLUE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(6), Inches(3.5),
                 '機械学習によるトラフィック予測と自動リソース配分\n• 障害検知: 99.7%精度\n• 最適化サイクル: 毎秒10万回\n• エネルギー効率: +28%', font_size=13, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def build_slide_10_security_evolution(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'セキュリティアーキテクチャの進化'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    phases = [
        ('フェーズ1', 'ゼロトラスト導入\n認証・認可の強化'),
        ('フェーズ2', '量子耐性暗号\n将来の脅威への備え'),
        ('フェーズ3', 'AIセキュリティ\n自動インシデント対応'),
    ]

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(phases):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 4.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(3.5), title, desc, '#121E33', '#FFD700')

    add_footer(slide, 10)


def build_slide_11_cloud_native(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'クラウドネイティブ変革'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['オンプレ', 'ハイブリッド', 'クラウド']
    chart_data.add_series('ワークロード配分（%）', (60, 25, 15))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(4), chart_data)
    plot = chart_frame.chart.plots[0]

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(6), Inches(4),
                 'マイクロサービスアーキテクチャへの移行\n• コンテナ化率: 80%目標\n• CI/CDパイプライン: 完全自動化\n• デプロイ頻度: 週3回→毎日', font_size=13, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 11)


def build_slide_12_roi_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = '投資対効果（ROI）分析'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['インフラ', 'ソフトウェア', '人材育成', '保守']
    chart_data.add_series('コスト配分（億円）', (800, 600, 420, 300))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5), chart_data)
    plot = chart_frame.chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.fill.solid()
        series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(6), Inches(4),
                 '投資回収期間: 3.2年\n内部収益率（IRR）: 24%\n正味現在価値（NPV）: ¥1,200億\n年間コスト削減: ¥920億', font_size=13, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 12)


def build_slide_13_roadmap_phase1(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = '実装ロードマップ - フェーズ1'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    items = [
        ('Q1 2025', '基盤インフラの準備\n光ファイバー敷設開始'),
        ('Q2 2025', '5Gコアネットワーク構築\nエッジノード設置（500箇所）'),
        ('Q3 2025', 'AI最適化プラットフォーム導入\nセキュリティ基盤強化'),
        ('Q4 2025', 'パイロットサービス展開\n性能ベンチマーク実施'),
    ]

    for i, (period, desc) in enumerate(items):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(2.8), Inches(4.5), period, desc, '#121E33', '#00D4FF')

    add_footer(slide, 13)


def build_slide_14_roadmap_phase2(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    items = [
        ('Q1 2026', 'クラウドネイティブ移行\nマイクロサービス化'),
        ('Q2 2026', '量子耐性暗号の導入\nゼロトラスト完全展開'),
        ('Q3 2026', 'AIセキュリティ統合\n自動運用開始'),
        ('Q4 2026', '6G技術検証\n次世代サービス準備'),
    ]

    for i, (period, desc) in enumerate(items):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(2.8), Inches(4.5), period, desc, '#121E33', '#FFD700')

    add_footer(slide, 14)


def build_slide_15_risk_assessment(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'リスク評価と対策'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    risks = [
        ('技術的リスク', '高', '新技術の成熟度不足\n対策: 段階的なPoC実施'),
        ('財政的リスク', '中', 'コスト超過の可能性\n対策: 15%予備費確保'),
        ('規制リスク', '低', '法改正の影響\n対策: 政府と緊密連携'),
    ]

    for i, (title, level, desc) in enumerate(risks):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 4.2)
        border_hex = '#FF6B6B' if level == '高' else ('#FFD700' if level == '中' else '#4ECDC4')
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(3.5), title, desc, '#121E33', border_hex)

    add_footer(slide, 15)


def build_slide_16_competitive_positioning(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = '競争優位性'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['当社', '競合A', '競合B']
    chart_data.add_series('技術力スコア', (92, 78, 65))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(4), chart_data)
    plot = chart_frame.chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.fill.solid()
        series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_BLUE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.7), Inches(6), Inches(4),
                 '市場シェア: 23%（業界第2位）\n特許出願数: 年80件\nR&D投資率: 売上比8%\n顧客満足度: 94点', font_size=13, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 16)


def build_slide_17_financial_projections(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = '財務予測'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['2025', '2026', '2027', '2028', '2029']
    chart_data.add_series('収益（億円）', (4500, 5200, 6100, 7300, 8800))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(7), Inches(4.5), chart_data)
    plot = chart_frame.chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.line.color.rgb = GOLD
    series.format.line.width = Pt(3)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.2), Inches(1.7), Inches(4.5), Inches(4.5),
                 '年間収益成長率: 18%\n営業利益率: 22%→28%\nEBITDAマージン: 35%\n配当利回り: 3.2%', font_size=13, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 17)


def build_slide_18_kpi_dashboard(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = '主要業績指標（KPI）'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    kpis = [
        ('ネットワーク可用性', '99.99%', '#00D4FF'),
        ('顧客満足度', '94点', '#4ECDC4'),
        ('サービス展開速度', '+40%', '#FFD700'),
        ('エネルギー効率', '-28%', '#B0C4DE'),
    ]

    for i, (label, value, color) in enumerate(kpis):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 3.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.7), Inches(2.8), Inches(2.5), label, value, '#121E33', color)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.6), Inches(12), Inches(2),
                 'KPIは月次でレビュー。クォーターごとに目標値を更新し、エグゼクティブ層に報告します。', font_size=13, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_footer(slide, 18)


def build_slide_19_call_to_action(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = '次のアクション'
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4), Inches(1.35))

    actions = [
        ('1', '投資委員会への提案資料の承認'),
        ('2', '技術パートナーとの契約締結'),
        ('3', '第1四半期の予算配分確定'),
        ('4', 'プロジェクトチームの編成開始'),
    ]

    for i, (num, text) in enumerate(actions):
        y = Inches(1.8) + Inches(i * 1.2)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1), y, Inches(1), Inches(0.5), num, font_size=24, bold=True, color_hex='#00D4FF')
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(9), Inches(0.5), text, font_size=16, color_hex='#FFFFFF')

    add_footer(slide, 19)


def build_slide_20_thank_you(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(None, slide, '#0A1628')

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3), Inches(2.5), Inches(7), Inches(1),
                 'ご清聴ありがとうございました', font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex='#FFFFFF')
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(4), Inches(3.8), Inches(5), Inches(3.8))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3), Inches(4.2), Inches(7), Inches(1),
                 '通信テクノロジー株式会社\n戦略企画本部 | 担当: 田中太郎', font_size=16, color_hex='#B0C4DE')

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3), Inches(5.5), Inches(7), Inches(0.8),
                 'email@telecom-tech.co.jp | +81-3-XXXX-XXXX', font_size=12, color_hex='#00D4FF')

    add_footer(slide, 20)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = HEIGHT

    build_slide_01_title(prs)
    build_slide_02_agenda(prs)
    build_slide_03_executive_summary(prs)
    build_slide_04_current_state(prs)
    build_slide_05_market_trends(prs)
    build_slide_06_technology_landscape(prs)
    build_slide_07_fiber_optic(prs)
    build_slide_08_edge_computing(prs)
    build_slide_09_ai_optimization(prs)
    build_slide_10_security_evolution(prs)
    build_slide_11_cloud_native(prs)
    build_slide_12_roi_analysis(prs)
    build_slide_13_roadmap_phase1(prs)
    build_slide_14_roadmap_phase2(prs)
    build_slide_15_risk_assessment(prs)
    build_slide_16_competitive_positioning(prs)
    build_slide_17_financial_projections(prs)
    build_slide_18_kpi_dashboard(prs)
    build_slide_19_call_to_action(prs)
    build_slide_20_thank_you(prs)

    prs.save('telecom_network.pptx')
    print('Presentation saved: telecom_network.pptx (20 slides)')


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
